title: Carotenoid oil extraction efficiencies in the case of Nannochloropsis gaditana S4 strain
author: Matos, Cristina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Carotenoids and astaxanthin (Ax) Extraction efficiency achieved by oil extraction from Nannochloropsis gaditana S4 strain grown at A4F facilities. Carotenoids and astaxanthin concentration was determined by spectrophotometric analysis
